message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 235 migrate 5 ambient storage calls (start of storage surface) (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Starts the main.rs StorageHandle surface migration. After the
WezTerm/IPC/cass/workflow surfaces were closed (ticks 224-234,
45 sites total), the storage surface is the next major one.

5 sites migrated this tick — all storage reads with cx-first
siblings from tick 149's 140/140 milestone:

1. L6993 read/search policy authorization: `storage.get_pane_with_cx(&storage_cx, pane_id)`
2. L8106 workflow context setup: `storage.get_pane_with_cx(&storage_cx, pane_id)`
3. L19594 robot workflow status pane check: `storage.get_pane_with_cx(&storage_cx, pane_id)`
4. L19634 robot workflow status by exec_id: `storage.get_workflow_with_cx(&storage_cx, exec_id)`
5. L19640 robot workflow step_logs: `storage.get_step_logs_with_cx(&storage_cx, exec_id)`
   (reuses `storage_cx` from same-scope get_workflow above)

Uses a locally-scoped `storage_cx` binding to avoid shadowing
other `cx` bindings that may be in nearby scope from earlier
wezterm/ipc migrations.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
